text: Not sure at this point. drier skin making wrinkles more prominent. Have used Retin-A, Tazarac for years off and on. As I've gotten older and menopausal, my skin is very dry. Was prescribed Renova and skin still very dry when I use it. I use CeraVe cleanser and CeraVe cream per derms recommendation even after using Renova but skin still very dry. I really want to continue using Retin-A and/or Renova and hope the dryness will improve.
